mapper.select:
SELECT a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, i.item_name AS itemName, b.bid_idx AS bidIdx, a.auction_idx AS auctionIdx, b.bidder_idx AS bidderIdx FROM bid b JOIN auction a ON b.auction_idx = a.auction_idx JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx WHERE b.bid_status_idx = 1
AND a.auction_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND i.item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
